reasons.persona: LHY oral feel strong: '端出一個相當囂張的產品', '跳出來砍', '最致命的一刀'; no AI-Tell traps.
reasons.clawdNote: All 4 notes have opinions; two honest self-referential callbacks to gu-log tribunal; good density (1 per ~17 lines).
reasons.vibe: Dialectical structure creates genuine tension; ending punch ('喊著別把命交給黑箱的產品...自己是黑箱') lands; highly shareable.
reasons.narrative: Clear arc: setup -> first attack -> technical deepening -> killing blow -> ironic synthesis; passes strip test (skeleton is dialectic, not report).
